text:
SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0–366 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable is derived in the TAF using the sum of values (days) from the monthly CHIP enrollment 
days variables (CHIP_ENRLMT_DAYS_01–12). 

It is possible for the value of both this variable and MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR to be zero. This occurs in 
cases where the enrollee has a valid enrollment period but the enrollment type = NULL in T-MSIS.
